q1_what_measured: Predictive accuracy + calibration of the full supervised WMV2 runtime on real post-model-release resolved questions (representative vault), and causal phase behavior separately (coverage vault). The two are never merged.
q2_outcome_leakage: Any path by which the resolved outcome influences the forecast: model weights trained on the outcome, retrieval of post-cutoff content, scorer files, question wording revealing resolution, market snapshot from after the cutoff.
q3_leakage_channels: model weights (mitigated: all questions OPEN after the model release 2026-04-24; serving-mutation risk measured by per-row probes + blinding)
retrieval (mitigated: frozen capsules; first_proven_available_at<=cutoff enforced at access; no live search)
q4_forecaster_information_at_T: The frozen capsule (archived bytes proven before T) + the blinded question + the model's pre-release world knowledge.
q5_model_knows_event: Impossible at release time (events post-date the snapshot); possible only via silent serving retraining — measured per row by name-only/recognition/no-evidence probes; contaminated rows classified and excluded from the clean census, preserved in the audit.
q6_question_in_training_data: No: every question opened after the model release (server timestamps).
q7_evidence_bytes_provable: Yes: Wikipedia revision timestamps (server-verified) and Wayback capture timestamps; sha256 of raw bytes stored per item.
q8_value_beyond_llm: Measured directly: direct single-call, call-matched ensemble, panel, and analogical baselines run on the SAME blinded question + capsule text with the SAME model.
q9_baseline_parity: Same capsule text (byte-identical render), same blinded question, same model alias, recorded per row.
q10_market_timestamp: Archived price tick at-or-before the exact cutoff; staleness recorded; never a closing price.
q11_cutoffs_not_independent: Correct: 4 cutoffs per world are correlated; all inference clusters by WORLD (bootstrap resamples worlds).
q12_contracts_clustered: Correlated contracts grouped into one event world at fetch time (gamma event grouping).
q13_phases_affect_world: Per-row PhaseExecutionRecords with StateDelta counts; rows with blocked relevant phases FAIL qualification; coverage vault runs matched ablations.
q14_perturbation_vs_effect: Coverage ablations report magnitude + direction + trajectory deltas, not just any float change; the representative headline does not use ablation effects at all.
q15_terminal_from_trajectories: raw_terminal_distribution from terminal WorldStates; terminal_source recorded per row; no LLM writes the final probability (contract tested).
q16_predictive_vs_causal: Both, separately: representative vault = predictive; coverage vault = causal.
q17_representative_of_use: High-volume real market questions across >=10 domains, chronological, no phase quotas; limitation recorded: market questions skew short-horizon/binary.
q18_statistical_power: 100 worlds / 400 rows; world-clustered bootstrap CIs; power limitation of 40-world locked split recorded in results.
q19_locked_test_influence: Locked resolutions sealed (REPLAY_SCORER=1 + single-open access log); calibration fit on cal worlds, selected on val worlds, frozen before locked rows are scored.
q20_independent_reviewer: Every row carries evidence hashes, proven timestamps, probes, phase records, freeze hash; the vault, splits and rules are frozen in code committed before forecasts.
